full_body.name: Jumping Jacks
full_body.description: Stand with feet together, jump while spreading arms and legs, then return.
full_body.tip: Keep a slight bend in your knees to reduce joint impact.

full_body.name: Knee Push-Ups
full_body.description: Push-up with knees on floor, maintaining straight back from knees to shoulders.
full_body.tip: Keep your core tight and don't let hips sag.

full_body.name: Bodyweight Squats
full_body.description: Stand feet shoulder-width, lower until thighs are parallel to floor.
full_body.tip: Keep chest up and knees tracking over toes.

full_body.name: Plank Hold
full_body.description: Hold a push-up position on forearms, keeping body straight.
full_body.tip: Breathe steadily and don't hold your breath.

full_body.name: Glute Bridge
full_body.description: Lie on back, feet flat, lift hips squeezing glutes at top.
full_body.tip: Drive through your heels, not your toes.

full_body.name: Burpees
full_body.description: Squat down, kick feet back to plank, do a push-up, jump feet forward, jump up.
full_body.tip: Maintain proper form over speed to protect your lower back.

full_body.name: Standard Push-Ups
full_body.description: Full push-up with toes on floor, lower chest to ground.
full_body.tip: Squeeze your chest at the top of each rep.

full_body.name: Jump Squats
full_body.description: Perform a squat then explode upward, landing softly.
full_body.tip: Land with soft knees to absorb impact and protect joints.

full_body.name: Mountain Climbers
full_body.description: In plank position, alternate driving knees to chest rapidly.
full_body.tip: Keep hips level and don't let them rock side to side.

full_body.name: Reverse Lunges
full_body.description: Step backward and lower back knee toward floor, return to standing.
full_body.tip: Keep front knee at 90 degrees and torso upright.

full_body.name: Plyometric Push-Ups
full_body.description: Push up with enough force for hands to leave floor at top.
full_body.tip: Warm up thoroughly; stop if you feel wrist discomfort.

full_body.name: Pistol Squats
full_body.description: Single-leg squat lowering until thigh is parallel to floor.
full_body.tip: Use a wall or chair for support when learning this movement.

full_body.name: Handstand Hold (Wall)
full_body.description: Kick up to a handstand against a wall and hold.
full_body.tip: Have a spotter for your first attempts at this exercise.

full_body.name: Dragon Flag
full_body.description: Lie on bench, grip behind head, lift legs and torso together.
full_body.tip: Build up to this gradually; it requires significant core strength.

full_body.name: Box Jumps
full_body.description: Jump explosively onto a box or platform, landing softly.
full_body.tip: Step down (don't jump down) to protect knees and ankles.

warmup.name: Arm Circles
warmup.description: Large slow circles forward then backward.

warmup.name: Hip Rotations
warmup.description: Hands on hips, rotate in large circles.

warmup.name: Leg Swings
warmup.description: Hold wall, swing leg forward and back.

warmup.name: Neck Rolls
warmup.description: Gently roll neck side to side, never fully backward.

warmup.name: March in Place
warmup.description: High knees marching to elevate heart rate.

cooldown.name: Standing Quad Stretch
cooldown.description: Hold ankle behind, keep knees together.

cooldown.name: Seated Hamstring Stretch
cooldown.description: Sit, extend one leg, reach toward toes.

cooldown.name: Child's Pose
cooldown.description: Kneel and extend arms forward, rest forehead on floor.

cooldown.name: Cat-Cow Stretch
cooldown.description: On all fours, alternate arching and rounding back.

cooldown.name: Deep Breathing
cooldown.description: Inhale for 4 counts, hold 4, exhale for 6.
